_meta.purpose: Curated intended decomposition constituents per concept — the oracle for the stated-extraction research loop (engine design §6.2). A candidate extractor is scored (precision/recall) against this set; iterate the boundary heuristic until it converges.
_meta.status: STARTER SEED — needs SME validation + expansion to ~20-50 concepts. C6135's pairs are the design §4.2 worked example; morphology (op:Morphology) filler code is TBD (Medullary Carcinoma).
_meta.constituent_format: [axis, filler] — axis is an NCIt role code (e.g. R101) or an op: axis (e.g. op:Morphology); filler is an NCIt concept code.

C6135.label: Stage III Thyroid Gland Medullary Carcinoma AJCC v7
